ultrafeedback:
### DATASET: UltraFeedback
### PUBLISH TIME: 2023
### CONTENT: large-scale preference dataset for reward model training and RLHF alignment research,
          ,→ containing ~64,000 single-turn prompts each paired with four model responses sampled
          ,→ from a pool of 17 LLMs and annotated by GPT-4 across multiple quality dimensions.
mmlupro:
### DATASET: MMLU-Pro (Massive Multitask Language Understanding Pro)
### PUBLISH TIME: 2024
### CONTENT: enhanced extension of MMLU for knowledge-intensive and reasoning-focused question
          ,→ answering across 14 domains, expanding answer choices from four to ten options to
          ,→ reduce saturation and increase sensitivity to chain-of-thought reasoning.
afrimedqa:
### DATASET: AfriMedQA
### PUBLISH TIME: 2024
### CONTENT: pan-African medical question answering benchmark sourced from 60+ medical schools
          ,→ across 16 countries, covering 32 specialties through multiple-choice and open-ended
          ,→ questions, designed to evaluate LLMs on African healthcare contexts and demographic bias.
bfcl:
### DATASET: BFCL (Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard)
### PUBLISH TIME: 2024
### CONTENT: for measuring LLM tool-use and function-calling ability across serial, parallel,
          ,→ and multi-turn scenarios in multiple programming languages, using Abstract Syntax Tree
          ,→ evaluation to assess real-world API invocation correctness.
mmbench_v11:
### DATASET: MMBench v1.1
### PUBLISH TIME: 2023 (v1.1 revised 2024)
### CONTENT: bilingual (English and Chinese) benchmark for evaluating vision-language models
          ,→ on multi-modal perception and reasoning through multiple-choice questions, with fine-
          ,→ grained ability assessment across diverse visual understanding tasks.
ai2d_test:
### DATASET: AI2D (Allen Institute for AI Diagrams) test set
### PUBLISH TIME: 2016
### CONTENT: for measuring diagram understanding and visual question answering on illustrative
          ,→ grade school science diagrams (food webs, life cycles, human physiology), with
          ,→ multiple-choice questions requiring interpretation of diagrammatic elements and relationships.
rewardbench:
### DATASET: RewardBench
### PUBLISH TIME: 2024
### CONTENT: for evaluating reward models used in RLHF, using prompt-win-lose trios spanning
          ,→ chat, reasoning, and safety categories, with structured comparisons that have verifiable
          ,→ reasons why one response should be preferred over another.
hle:
### DATASET: HLE (Humanity's Last Exam)
### PUBLISH TIME: 2025
### CONTENT: frontier multi-modal academic benchmark of 2,500 expert-authored questions across
          ,→ mathematics, humanities, and natural sciences, designed to resist internet lookup and
          ,→ assess LLM capabilities at the limits of human knowledge, in response to saturation of
          ,→ prior benchmarks.
agentdojo:
### DATASET: AgentDojo
### PUBLISH TIME: 2024
### CONTENT: dynamic evaluation framework for measuring adversarial robustness of tool-calling
          ,→ LLM agents against indirect prompt injection attacks, jointly assessing task utility
          ,→ and security across realistic environments including email, calendar, and banking suites.
livecodebench:
### DATASET: LiveCodeBench
### PUBLISH TIME: 2024
### CONTENT: contamination-free coding benchmark continuously updated with new competition
          ,→ problems from LeetCode, AtCoder, and CodeForces, evaluating code generation,
          ,→ self-repair, code execution, and test output prediction beyond isolated function generation.
mathvista_mini:
### DATASET: MathVista (mini)
### PUBLISH TIME: 2023
### CONTENT: for measuring mathematical reasoning in visual contexts, combining challenges from
          ,→ 28 multimodal datasets spanning figures, charts, geometry, and scientific diagrams;
          ,→ the mini subset (testmini) contains 1,000 examples used for standard evaluation.
swebench:
### DATASET: SWE-bench (Verified)
### PUBLISH TIME: 2024
### CONTENT: for evaluating LLM agents on real-world software engineering by resolving actual
          ,→ GitHub issues across Python repositories; the Verified subset of 500 problems was
          ,→ human-validated to confirm solvability, using execution-based evaluation against
          ,→ existing test suites.
matharena:
### DATASET: MathArena
### PUBLISH TIME: 2025
### CONTENT: contamination-free benchmark for evaluating LLMs on mathematical reasoning using
          ,→ uncontaminated problems from recurring competitions (AIME, HMMT, USAMO, IMO);
          ,→ the first benchmark to include formal proof-writing evaluation alongside final-answer tasks.
mtbench:
### DATASET: MT-Bench
### PUBLISH TIME: 2023
### CONTENT: for evaluating LLM chat assistants on multi-turn conversational ability using 80
          ,→ open-ended questions across writing, reasoning, math, coding, and knowledge categories,
          ,→ scored by GPT-4 as judge; introduced alongside the LLM-as-a-judge paradigm.
androidworld:
### DATASET: AndroidWorld
### PUBLISH TIME: 2024
### CONTENT: dynamic benchmarking environment for autonomous agents, providing reward signals
          ,→ for 116 programmatic tasks across 20 real-world Android applications, with randomized
          ,→ task parameterization to test generalization and robustness of mobile GUI agents.
cybench:
### DATASET: CyBench
### PUBLISH TIME: 2024
### CONTENT: for measuring cybersecurity capabilities and risks of LLM agents through 40
          ,→ professional-level Capture the Flag (CTF) challenges from HackTheBox, SekaiCTF,
          ,→ Glacier, and HKCert competitions, spanning cryptography, web security, reverse
          ,→ engineering, forensics, and exploitation.
